current_suggestion.channel_name: TEDx Talks – Russ Roberts (EconTalk host solo appearances)
current_suggestion.pitch: Roberts hosts EconTalk but his standalone channel covers the intersection of economics, humility in reasoning, and how to live well — directly bridging your Ben Felix macro interest with your Stoicism and mental models interest in a way none of your current channels do. He draws heavily on Hayek, Smith's Theory of Moral Sentiments, and epistemic humility about what data can and can't tell us — a useful steelman against overconfident health and finance claims you're absorbing elsewhere. Format is a mix of solo reflections, prepared talks, and occasional interviews, all at high intellectual density.

history: TEDx Talks – Russ Roberts (EconTalk host solo appearances)
